item.consumable.key.name: Key
item.consumable.key.description: A skeleton key, capable of opening the many locks within the dungeon.

item.potion.healing.minor.flavour: Small golden lights roil amidst the crimson liquid.

item.potion.haste.minor.name: Minor Haste Potion
item.potion.haste.minor.flavour: Small sparks leap out of the swirling liquid.
item.potion.casting.minor.name: Minor Casting Potion
item.potion.casting.minor.flavour: Pearlescent ichor, shifting in the light.
item.potion.attack_power.minor.name: Minor Power Potion
item.potion.attack_power.minor.flavour: Fleks of metal glint inside the dull orange liquid.
item.potion.spell_power.minor.name: Minor Spell Power Potion
item.potion.spell_power.minor.flavour: Crackling power swims within the Zima.
item.potion.experience.name: Potion of Knowledge
item.potion.experience.description:
Grants [key.variable.static]({0:N0}) [key.mechanic.experience] when consumed.
Condensened understanding - bottled engrams from the [key.lore.lich] themselves.[key.style.break_small][key.flavour.secret](What could you possibly understand of it?)
item.potion.experience.flavour: Venomous wisps of emerald thought spin and twirl within.
item.potion.skill.name: Skill Potion
item.potion.skill.description: Grants [key.variable.static](1) [key.mechanic.skill_point_global] when consumed.[key.flavour.secret](This was once someone, a person.)[key.style.break_small][key.flavour.secret](No longer.)
item.potion.skill.flavour: Within the glowing solution, Memories swim like tiny, ethereal fish.
item.potion.luck.name: Luck Potion
item.potion.luck.flavour: Aureate oil churns within, shining with the splendor of mercurial gold.
item.potion.attribute.name: Aptitude Potion
item.potion.attribute.flavour: Vermillion talent, secured in a small glass bottle - just for you.
item.potion.shields.name: Potion of Shields
item.potion.shields.description:
Conjures [key.variable.static]({0:N0}) [key.flag.arcane](shields) to defend you.
These shields will each [key.mechanic.parry] an incoming attack before dissipating.
item.potion.shields.flavour: Unsettling purple fluid follows your fingers as they trace across the glass.
